name: Pet Rock
description:
Ever wanted to have a pet rock? Well today's your lucky day!

Meet your very own Pet Rock! Feed it, play with it, teach it tricks - there are ENDLESS things you can do with it!

Bring it to school for show and tell or keep it in your office as a work buddy, it's up to you to decide how to treat your Pet Rock! 

Guides on caring for your Pet Rock can be found anywhere online. Have fun with your new Pet Rock!
